sentences.en: I want to meet your family.
I shower and get dressed.
My brother lives next door.
It's a quarter to eight.
This one is actually worth the money.
I'm going to buy the ticket.
Go straight until the square.
I looked for it everywhere.
I'm worried about my friend.
I'm almost never right.
Why are you in such a hurry?
Do you want to go out or would you rather sleep?
I don't know how to use this phone.
Do you eat at home or out?
We threw a party on Friday.
I'm going to pack my bag.
Don't ask me.
I asked where the bathroom was.
He asked me when we're meeting up.

sentences.t: 그 사람 춤 진짜 잘 춰요.
sentences.en: She knows how to dance really well.

sentences.en: Today is the eighth of March.
I missed the bus again.
Until what time do you work today?
He goes to bed really late.
She eats and then works.
We eat at home every day.

sentences.t: 오늘 새로운 거 해 보고 싶었어요.
sentences.en: I wanted to try something new today.

sentences.en: Take this pill and rest.
It's really hot in summer.
Shall we meet tomorrow or Thursday?
Do you have something for the pain?
I'm selling it for a hundred euros.
Sometimes I want something sweet.
Are you going to come see me?
When do you get back from your trip?
I do the shopping on Saturdays.
Tell me what the boss said.

sentences.t: 언제 돌아오는지 말 안 해 줬어요.
sentences.en: He didn't tell me when he was coming back.
sentences.r: eonje doraoneunji mal an hae jwosseoyo.

sentences.en: Why didn't you ask earlier?

sentences.t: 우리 형은 뭐든 고칠 줄 알아요.
sentences.en: My brother knows how to fix everything.

sentences.en: I don't know that girl.

sentences.en: I get up at seven.
I go to bed at eleven.
What time do you get up?
How long have you been living here?
What time do you finish today?
My birthday is in May.
Every Monday I start again.

I spend a lot of money on coffee.
My whole body hurts.
Tomorrow I'll feel better.
I study Spanish every morning.
It's three thirty.
My dad is fifty years old.
We should go out more often.
Don't tell me the ending.
Should we each pay our own?
I used to live with my parents.
I want to sell these old things.
That movie made me cry.
I have a lot to do today.
Tomorrow I have a lot to do.
I only know that it's late.
Who says I can't?
I have everything I need.
She says she doesn't know.
I can't right now, sorry.

sentences.t: 저는 일하기 전엔 절대 안 먹어요.
sentences.en: I never eat before working.

sentences.en: I have to go to the doctor.
I didn't go because I was tired.
No, I'm not ready yet.
I'm always late, I know.
I don't want anything else, thanks.

Her name is Ana, right?
I'm sleepy, I need a coffee.
I'm not sick, I'm just tired.
I need to rest a bit.
Tell me the truth, please.
I'm happy because it's Friday.
Because I always prefer tea.

sentences.t: 뭐든 먹고 싶은 거 먹어도 돼요.

sentences.en: I think it's really good.
